response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and platforms, including C and C++ (though not heavily in the last decade), and shows strong technical versatility. However, they lack the mandatory 5–10 years of hands-on C++ development on the Windows platform required for this role, and there is no clear evidence of domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking. Their recent work is heavily focused on Node.js, TypeScript, and AI-agent infrastructure, which does not align with the core responsibilities of the position.
strengths: Strong general software development background with experience in C/C++ (including LabWindows/CVI)
Proven ability to build and optimize high-performance systems (e.g., low-latency apps, real-time data handling)
Experience with test-driven development (TDD), CI/CD, and modern development practices (pairing, trunk-based development)
concerns: Lacks recent and substantial C++ development experience on Windows platform (mandatory requirement)
No demonstrated domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking
Recent work heavily focused on Node.js, TypeScript, and AI-agent infrastructure, not aligned with role's core responsibilities
